db:select.doc:name: Select active pricing
db:select.db:sql: SELECT pricing_id, base_fare, per_mile_rate, per_minute_rate, minimum_fare, booking_fee, is_active, effective_from, created_at FROM ridexpress.pricing WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY effective_from DESC LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { pricingId: payload[0].pricing_id, baseFare: payload[0].base_fare, perMileRate: payload[0].per_mile_rate, perMinuteRate: payload[0].per_minute_rate, minimumFare: payload[0].minimum_fare, bookingFee: payload[0].booking_fee, isActive: payload[0].is_active, effectiveFrom: payload[0].effective_from, createdAt: payload[0].created_at }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "No active pricing configuration found"}

db:select.doc:name: Select surge zones
db:select.db:sql: SELECT zone_id, zone_name, surge_multiplier, demand_count, supply_count, last_calculated_at, created_at FROM ridexpress.surge_zones ORDER BY surge_multiplier DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map { zoneId: $.zone_id, zoneName: $.zone_name, surgeMultiplier: $.surge_multiplier, demandCount: $.demand_count, supplyCount: $.supply_count, lastCalculatedAt: $.last_calculated_at, createdAt: $.created_at }

db:select.doc:name: Select active ride types
db:select.db:sql: SELECT ride_type_id, name, description, price_multiplier, min_vehicle_year, is_active, created_at FROM ridexpress.ride_types WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY price_multiplier ASC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map { rideTypeId: $.ride_type_id, name: $.name, description: $.description, priceMultiplier: $.price_multiplier, minVehicleYear: $.min_vehicle_year, isActive: $.is_active, createdAt: $.created_at }
